Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT adm_lid,adm_name FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
smsSendValidCode sql
Set.Sql: select ewa_func.sms_send_validcode(@g_adm_id, @mobile ,rv) result,'json' rst_type

Set.Name: checkMobile
Set.Sql: select top 1 * from ( select TOP 1 '与系统中的手机号相同，无需更改' result,'text' rst_type from ADM_USER where ADM_MOBILE = @MOBILE and ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID union select TOP 1 '此手机号已注册，请更换' result,'text' rst_type from ADM_USER where ADM_MOBILE = @MOBILE and ADM_ID != @G_ADM_ID union select '手机号不一致' result,'text' rst_type from WEB_USER_FPWD where fp_unid=@fp_unid and FP_VALIDCODE = @sms_code and FP_REF_TABLE!=@MOBILE and @ewa_action='OnPagePost' ) x where 1=1

Set.Name: checkValidCode
Set.Sql: select ewa_func.valid_adm_user_code(@fp_unid, @sms_code, rv) result,'text' rst_type

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT adm_lid,adm_name FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql:
UPDATE ADM_USER SET ADM_PWD = @ADM_PWD, ADM_mdate = @sys_date WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID;
INSERT INTO ADM_LOG(SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_TYPE , LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT , LOG_IP, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID) SELECT ISNULL(SUP_ID,-1), ADM_ID, ISNULL(adm_name,'-') , '修改密码', 'LOGIN_CHPWD' , @sys_date, @adm_pwd1, @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT , @SYS_REMOTEip, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, '' FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT adm_lid,adm_name FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_TMP_ADM_ID

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ADM_USER SET ADM_PWD = @ADM_PWD, ADM_mdate = @sys_date, ADM_CHG_PWD = 'N' WHERE ADM_ID = @G_TMP_ADM_ID

Set.Name: chkpwd
Set.Sql:
SELECT '

密码和上次重复，请更换不同的密码

' AS EWA_ERR_OUT FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID=@G_TMP_ADM_ID AND ADM_PWD=@ADM_PWD;

Set.Name: 修改密码日志
Set.Sql:
INSERT INTO ADM_LOG(SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, LOG_CONTENT, LOG_TYPE , LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT , LOG_IP, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID) SELECT ISNULL(SUP_ID,-1), ADM_ID, ISNULL(adm_name,'-') , '修改密码', 'LOGIN_CHPWD' , @sys_date, @adm_pwd1, @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT , @SYS_REMOTEip, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, ''
FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_TMP_ADM_ID

Set.Info: 密码修改成功,点击确定重新登录
Password modified successfully, click OK to login again

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID and sup_id=@G_sup_id

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ADM_USER SET ADM_MDATE = getdate() WHERE ADM_ID = @ADM_ID and SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID

Set.UpSQL: update ADM_USER set ADM_PHOTO=@ewa_up_file where adm_id=@g_adm_id
update ADM_USER set ADM_PHOTO=@ewa_up_file where adm_id=@g_adm_id

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID and sup_id=@G_sup_id

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ADM_USER SET ADM_MDATE = getdate(), ADM_SIGN_PIC=@ADM_SIGN_PIC WHERE ADM_ID = @ADM_ID and SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID

Set.UpSQL: update ADM_USER set ADM_SIGN_PIC=@ewa_up_file where adm_id=@g_adm_id

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID and sup_id=@G_sup_id

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ADM_USER SET ADM_MDATE = getdate() WHERE ADM_ID = @ADM_ID and SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID

Set.UpSQL: update ADM_USER set ADM_PHOTO=@ewa_up_file where adm_id=@g_adm_id

Set.CallName: 记录日志登录成功 SQL
记录日志登录失败 SQL
检查原生App是否需要更新

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: select adm_lid from adm_user where adm_id = @INIT_ADM_ID and ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK'

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT top 1 C1.SUP_DOWN_ID , ISNULL(E.DEP_ID,-1) AS SX_DEP_ID -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_ID，>1 表示是地方办公室 , ISNULL(E.DEP_LVL,'NONE') AS SX_DEP_LVL -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_LVL , A.ADM_ID , A.ADM_NAME , A.ADM_NAME_EN , A.ADM_DEP_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID DEP_POS_ID1 , A.ADM_UNID , A.ADM_CHG_PWD , a.PID , 1 AS CNT , C.SUP_ID , C.SUP_NAME , C.SUP_UNID , D.ERP_SKIN , WU.USR_ID -- 创建 G_WEB_USR_ID , WU.USR_UNID -- 创建 G_USR_UNID , WU.USR_NAME -- 创建 G_USR_NAME , cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE -- 创建 G_CRM_CUS_TYPE FROM V_ADM_USER_POST_DEPT A LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN C ON A.SUP_ID = C.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN crm_conn c1 ON c1.crm_com_id=A.crm_com_id and sup_up_id=C.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ADM_USER D ON A.ADM_ID = D.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN DEP_PART E ON A.DEP_ID = E.DEP_ID -- 地方办公室 LEFT JOIN WEB_USER WU ON D.WEB_USR_ID = WU.USR_ID AND D.WEB_USR_ID > 0 LEFT JOIN CRM_CUS cc on D.CRM_CUS_ID=cc.CRM_CUS_ID WHERE ( (A.ADM_LID = @ADM_LID Or A.ADM_EMAIL = @ADM_LID or a.ADM_MOBILE = @ADM_LID) AND A.ADM_PWD=@ADM_PWD AND LEN(ISNULL(@ADM_LID,'')) >= 6 OR A.ADM_ID in ( -- 微信登录验证 select USR_ID from WEB_USER_FPWD where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_TYPE='WX_ADM_LOGIN' and FP_UDATE is not null ) OR A.ADM_ID in ( -- B2B登录验证 select USR_ID from WEB_USER_FPWD where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_TYPE='B2B_ADM_LOGIN' and FP_UDATE is null and FP_EDATE>@SYS_DATE ) ) and A.adm_usr_sta_tag<>'DEL';

Set.Name: update user login info sql
获取下级用户编号
Set.Sql: PR_GET_SUB_ADMS(@adm_id, @IDS_OUT)

Set.Name: 获取ADM_USER关联的WEB_USER
记录日志登录成功 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, LOG_CONTENT , LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(@SUP_ID, @ADM_ID, @ADM_NAME , '登录成功', 'LOGIN_SUCCESS', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 记录日志登录失败 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME , LOG_CONTENT, LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(isnull(@G_SUP_ID,-1), isnull(@G_ADM_ID,-1), @ADM_LID , '失败', 'LOGIN_FAIL', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 绑定微信用户
Set.Sql: IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM WX_USER_ADM_USER WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND ADM_ID=@ADM_ID AND SUP_ID=@SUP_ID AND ROLE_TYPE = 'ERP' AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ) INSERT INTO WX_USER_ADM_USER (WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, ROLE_TYPE, ADM_ID, SUP_ID, CDATE) select WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, 'ERP', @ADM_ID, @SUP_ID, @SYS_DATE from wx_user WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ;

Set.Name: 检查原生App是否需要更新
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP=@APP_NAME ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD DESC;

Set.Name: 更新FPWD使用时间B2B
Set.Sql: UPDATE WEB_USER_FPWD SET FP_UDATE=@SYS_DATE where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_TYPE='B2B_ADM_LOGIN' and FP_UDATE is null and FP_EDATE>@SYS_DATE

Set.Info: 北京路嘉华阳国际咨询有限公司 版权所有 ? 2003-
China Sunshine Consulting Group Co., LTD all rights reserved ? 2003-
您的密码已过期，点击确定更改密码。
Your password has expired, click OK to change your password.

Set.CallName: 记录日志登录成功 SQL
记录日志登录失败 SQL
检查原生App是否需要更新

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: select adm_lid from adm_user where adm_id = @INIT_ADM_ID and ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK'

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT top 1 C1.SUP_DOWN_ID , ISNULL(E.DEP_ID,-1) AS SX_DEP_ID -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_ID，>1 表示是地方办公室 , ISNULL(E.DEP_LVL,'NONE') AS SX_DEP_LVL -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_LVL , A.ADM_ID , A.ADM_NAME , A.ADM_NAME_EN , A.ADM_DEP_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID DEP_POS_ID1 , A.ADM_UNID , A.ADM_CHG_PWD , a.PID , 1 AS CNT , C.SUP_ID , C.SUP_NAME , C.SUP_UNID , D.ERP_SKIN , WU.USR_ID -- 创建 G_WEB_USR_ID , WU.USR_UNID -- 创建 G_USR_UNID , WU.USR_NAME -- 创建 G_USR_NAME , case when c1.SUP_DOWN_ID is null then '' when cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE is null or cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE='' then 'CUS_EMPLOYEE' else cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE end CRM_CUS_TYPE -- 创建 G_CRM_CUS_TYPE FROM V_ADM_USER_POST_DEPT A LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN C ON A.SUP_ID = C.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN crm_conn c1 ON c1.crm_com_id=A.crm_com_id and sup_up_id=C.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ADM_USER D ON A.ADM_ID = D.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN DEP_PART E ON A.DEP_ID = E.DEP_ID -- 地方办公室 LEFT JOIN WEB_USER WU ON D.WEB_USR_ID = WU.USR_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CUS cc on D.CRM_CUS_ID=cc.CRM_CUS_ID WHERE ( (A.ADM_LID = @ADM_LID Or A.ADM_EMAIL = @ADM_LID or a.ADM_MOBILE = @ADM_LID) AND A.ADM_PWD=@ADM_PWD AND LEN(ISNULL(@ADM_LID,'')) >= 6 OR A.ADM_ID in ( select USR_ID from WEB_USER_FPWD where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_UDATE is null ) ) and A.adm_usr_sta_tag<>'DEL' ;
delete from WEB_USER_FPWD where @FP_UNID is not null and FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE ;

Set.Name: update user login info sql
获取下级用户编号
Set.Sql: PR_GET_SUB_ADMS(@adm_id, @IDS_OUT)

Set.Name: 获取ADM_USER关联的WEB_USER
记录日志登录成功 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, LOG_CONTENT , LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(@SUP_ID, @ADM_ID, @ADM_NAME , '登录成功', 'LOGIN_SUCCESS', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 记录日志登录失败 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME , LOG_CONTENT, LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(isnull(@G_SUP_ID,-1), isnull(@G_ADM_ID,-1), @ADM_LID , '失败', 'LOGIN_FAIL', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 绑定微信用户
Set.Sql: IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM WX_USER_ADM_USER WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND ADM_ID=@ADM_ID AND SUP_ID=@SUP_ID AND ROLE_TYPE = 'ERP' AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ) INSERT INTO WX_USER_ADM_USER (WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, ROLE_TYPE, ADM_ID, SUP_ID, CDATE) select WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, 'ERP', @ADM_ID, @SUP_ID, @SYS_DATE from wx_user WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ;

Set.Name: 检查原生App是否需要更新
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP=@APP_NAME ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD DESC;

Set.Name: 更新FPWD使用时间B2B
Set.Sql: UPDATE WEB_USER_FPWD SET FP_UDATE=@SYS_DATE where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_TYPE='B2B_ADM_LOGIN' and FP_UDATE is null and FP_EDATE>@SYS_DATE

Set.Info: 北京路嘉华阳国际咨询有限公司 版权所有 ? 2003-
China Sunshine Consulting Group Co., LTD all rights reserved ? 2003-
您的密码已过期，点击确定更改密码。
Your password has expired, click OK to change your password.

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.*,B.DEP_NAME FROM ADM_USER A LEFT JOIN ADM_DEPT B ON A.ADM_DEP_ID=B.DEP_ID WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID

Set.Name: OnNew SQL
OnModify SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ADM_USER SET SEX_TAG = @SEX_TAG , ADM_NAME = @ADM_NAME , ADM_NAME_EN = @ADM_NAME_EN , ADM_EMAIL = @ADM_EMAIL , ADM_MOBILE = @ADM_MOBILE , ADM_UNID = isnull(ADM_UNID,@SYS_UNID) , ADM_MDATE= getdate() WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID AND (SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID)

Set.Name: AddAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: select adm_lid from adm_user where ADM_LID=@ADM_LID

Set.Name: load_pos sql
Set.Sql: SELECT * from adm_r_udp where adm_id=19

Set.SearchSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'SEX' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Sql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'SEX' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Info: The login name already exists, please modify

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
OnModify SQL
UAct0 SQL
Set.Sql: -- write your sql

Set.Name: UAct1 SQL
Set.Sql: -- write your sql

Set.Name: SAct0 SQL
Set.Sql: -- SELECT ...

Set.Name: SAct1 SQL
Set.Sql: -- SELECT ...

Set.Name: CheckError SQL
Set.Sql: -- select 不能执行 as EWA_ERR_OUT FROM xxx where 1=2

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT ADM_ID, SEX_TAG, ADM_DEP_ID, CASE WHEN ADM_LID = '' THEN CASE WHEN @ewa_lang = 'enus' THEN '[No]' ELSE '[未设定]' END ELSE ADM_LID END AS ADM_LID, ADM_NAME, ADM_NAME_EN, ADM_IDCARD, ADM_TELE, ADM_EMAIL, ADM_QQ, ADM_MSN, ADM_ICQ, ADM_MOBILE, ADM_ADDR, ADM_OP, CERTIFICATE, ADM_EDUCATION, ADM_CERTIFICATE, B.DEP_NAME FROM ADM_USER A LEFT JOIN ADM_DEPT B ON A.ADM_DEP_ID = B.DEP_ID WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID;

Set.Name: OnNew SQL
OnModify SQL
Set.Sql:
UPDATE ADM_USER SET SEX_TAG = @SEX_TAG, ADM_NAME = @ADM_NAME, ADM_NAME_EN = @ADM_NAME_EN, ADM_IDCARD = @ADM_IDCARD, ADM_TELE = @ADM_TELE, ADM_EMAIL = @ADM_EMAIL, ADM_QQ = @ADM_QQ, ADM_MSN = @ADM_MSN, ADM_ICQ = @ADM_ICQ, ADM_MOBILE = @ADM_MOBILE, ADM_ADDR = @ADM_ADDR, ADM_OP = @ADM_OP, ADM_UNID = isnull(ADM_UNID, @SYS_UNID), ADM_MDATE = getdate(), EMERGENCY_CONTACT = @EMERGENCY_CONTACT, EMERGENCY_PHONE = @EMERGENCY_PHONE WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID AND (SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID) AND @G_F_SUP_ID IS NULL;
-- 代理不能更改 ADM_MOBILE,ADM_EMAIL,ADM_OP UPDATE ADM_USER SET SEX_TAG = @SEX_TAG, ADM_NAME = @ADM_NAME, ADM_NAME_EN = @ADM_NAME_EN, ADM_IDCARD = @ADM_IDCARD, ADM_TELE = @ADM_TELE, ADM_QQ = @ADM_QQ, ADM_MSN = @ADM_MSN, ADM_ICQ = @ADM_ICQ, ADM_ADDR = @ADM_ADDR, ADM_UNID = isnull(ADM_UNID, @SYS_UNID), ADM_MDATE = getdate(), EMERGENCY_CONTACT = @EMERGENCY_CONTACT, EMERGENCY_PHONE = @EMERGENCY_PHONE WHERE ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID AND (SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID) AND @G_F_SUP_ID IS NOT NULL;

Set.Name: AddAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: select adm_lid from adm_user where ADM_LID=@ADM_LID

Set.Name: load_pos sql
Set.Sql: SELECT * from adm_r_udp where adm_id=19
SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='COM_YES_NO' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD
SELECT * FROM BAS_SEX_TAG WHERE 1=1

Set.Info: Set up the outgoing mail server
Login name already exists, modify the

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.ADM_NAME, A.ADM_MOBILE, A.ADM_TELE, A.ADM_UNID, A.ADM_USR_STA_TAG, B.SUP_NAME, B.SUP_UNID FROM ADM_USER A INNER JOIN sup_main B ON a.SUP_ID = b.SUP_ID WHERE A.ADM_USR_STA_TAG = 'OK' AND ( A.ADM_MOBILE = @ADM_MOBILE OR A.ADM_MOBILE = '+86 ' + @ADM_MOBILE OR A.ADM_TELE = @ADM_MOBILE OR A.ADM_TELE = '+86 ' + @ADM_MOBILE ) ORDER BY adm_id

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql: update ADM_USER set ADM_USR_STA_TAG='DEL' WHERE ADM_ID = @ADM_ID and SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ADM_USER SET ADM_DEP_ID = @DEP_ID, ADM_MDATE = @sys_date WHERE ADM_ID = @ADM_ID AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: DELETE FROM ADM_R_UDP WHERE ADM_ID=@ADM_ID AND DEP_POS_ID=@DEP_POS_ID AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ADM_USER WHERE ADM_ID=@ADM_ID AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID);

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: update ADM_USER set ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK' WHERE ADM_ID = @ADM_ID AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: 全部菜单授权

Set.SearchSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'COM_YES_NO' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.RefSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'COM_YES_NO' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.CallName: 记录日志登录成功 SQL
记录日志登录失败 SQL
检查原生App是否需要更新

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: select adm_lid from adm_user where adm_id = @INIT_ADM_ID and ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK'

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT top 1 C1.SUP_DOWN_ID , ISNULL(E.DEP_ID,-1) AS SX_DEP_ID -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_ID，>1 表示是地方办公室 , ISNULL(E.DEP_LVL,'NONE') AS SX_DEP_LVL -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_LVL , A.ADM_ID , A.ADM_NAME , A.ADM_NAME_EN , A.ADM_DEP_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID DEP_POS_ID1 , A.ADM_UNID , A.ADM_CHG_PWD , a.PID , 1 AS CNT , C.SUP_ID , C.SUP_NAME , C.SUP_UNID , D.ERP_SKIN , WU.USR_ID -- 创建 G_WEB_USR_ID , WU.USR_UNID -- 创建 G_USR_UNID , WU.USR_NAME -- 创建 G_USR_NAME , case when c1.SUP_DOWN_ID is null then '' when cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE is null or cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE='' then 'CUS_EMPLOYEE' else cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE end CRM_CUS_TYPE -- 创建 G_CRM_CUS_TYPE FROM V_ADM_USER_POST_DEPT A LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN C ON A.SUP_ID = C.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN crm_conn c1 ON c1.crm_com_id=A.crm_com_id and sup_up_id=C.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ADM_USER D ON A.ADM_ID = D.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN DEP_PART E ON A.DEP_ID = E.DEP_ID -- 地方办公室 LEFT JOIN WEB_USER WU ON D.WEB_USR_ID = WU.USR_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CUS cc on D.CRM_CUS_ID=cc.CRM_CUS_ID WHERE ( (A.ADM_LID = @ADM_LID Or A.ADM_EMAIL = @ADM_LID or a.ADM_MOBILE = @ADM_LID) AND A.ADM_PWD=@ADM_PWD AND LEN(ISNULL(@ADM_LID,'')) > 3 OR A.ADM_ID in ( select USR_ID from WEB_USER_FPWD where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_UDATE is null ) ) and A.adm_usr_sta_tag<>'DEL' ;
delete from WEB_USER_FPWD where @FP_UNID is not null and FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE ;

Set.Name: update user login info sql
获取下级用户编号
Set.Sql: PR_GET_SUB_ADMS(@adm_id, @IDS_OUT)

Set.Name: 获取ADM_USER关联的WEB_USER
记录日志登录成功 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, LOG_CONTENT , LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(@SUP_ID, @ADM_ID, @ADM_NAME , '登录成功', 'LOGIN_SUCCESS', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 记录日志登录失败 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME , LOG_CONTENT, LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(isnull(@G_SUP_ID,-1), isnull(@G_ADM_ID,-1), @ADM_LID , '失败', 'LOGIN_FAIL', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 绑定微信用户
Set.Sql: IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM WX_USER_ADM_USER WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND ADM_ID=@ADM_ID AND SUP_ID=@SUP_ID AND ROLE_TYPE = 'ERP' AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ) INSERT INTO WX_USER_ADM_USER (WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, ROLE_TYPE, ADM_ID, SUP_ID, CDATE) select WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, 'ERP', @ADM_ID, @SUP_ID, @SYS_DATE from wx_user WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ;

Set.Name: 检查原生App是否需要更新
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP=@APP_NAME ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD DESC;

Set.Name: 更新FPWD使用时间B2B
Set.Sql: UPDATE WEB_USER_FPWD SET FP_UDATE=@SYS_DATE where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_TYPE='B2B_ADM_LOGIN' and FP_UDATE is null and FP_EDATE>@SYS_DATE

Set.Info: 北京路嘉华阳国际咨询有限公司 版权所有 ? 2003-
China Sunshine Consulting Group Co., LTD all rights reserved ? 2003-
您的密码已过期，点击确定更改密码。
Your password has expired, click OK to change your password.

Set.CallName: 记录日志登录成功 SQL
记录日志登录失败 SQL
检查原生App是否需要更新

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: select adm_lid from adm_user where adm_id = @INIT_ADM_ID and ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK'

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT top 1 C1.SUP_DOWN_ID , ISNULL(E.DEP_ID,-1) AS SX_DEP_ID -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_ID，>1 表示是地方办公室 , ISNULL(E.DEP_LVL,'NONE') AS SX_DEP_LVL -- 创建 G_SX_DEP_LVL , A.ADM_ID , A.ADM_NAME , A.ADM_NAME_EN , A.ADM_DEP_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID , A.DEP_POS_ID DEP_POS_ID1 , A.ADM_UNID , A.ADM_CHG_PWD , a.PID , 1 AS CNT , C.SUP_ID , C.SUP_NAME , C.SUP_UNID , D.ERP_SKIN , WU.USR_ID -- 创建 G_WEB_USR_ID , WU.USR_UNID -- 创建 G_USR_UNID , WU.USR_NAME -- 创建 G_USR_NAME , case when c1.SUP_DOWN_ID is null then '' when cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE is null or cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE='' then 'CUS_EMPLOYEE' else cc.CRM_CUS_TYPE end CRM_CUS_TYPE -- 创建 G_CRM_CUS_TYPE FROM V_ADM_USER_POST_DEPT A LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN C ON A.SUP_ID = C.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN crm_conn c1 ON c1.crm_com_id=A.crm_com_id and sup_up_id=C.SUP_ID INNER JOIN ADM_USER D ON A.ADM_ID = D.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN DEP_PART E ON A.DEP_ID = E.DEP_ID -- 地方办公室 LEFT JOIN WEB_USER WU ON D.WEB_USR_ID = WU.USR_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CUS cc on D.CRM_CUS_ID=cc.CRM_CUS_ID WHERE ( (A.ADM_LID = @ADM_LID Or A.ADM_EMAIL = @ADM_LID or a.ADM_MOBILE = @ADM_LID) AND A.ADM_PWD=@ADM_PWD AND LEN(ISNULL(@ADM_LID,'')) > 3 OR A.ADM_ID in ( select USR_ID from WEB_USER_FPWD where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_UDATE is null ) ) and A.adm_usr_sta_tag<>'DEL' ;
delete from WEB_USER_FPWD where @FP_UNID is not null and FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE ;

Set.Name: update user login info sql
获取下级用户编号
Set.Sql: PR_GET_SUB_ADMS(@adm_id, @IDS_OUT)

Set.Name: 获取ADM_USER关联的WEB_USER
记录日志登录成功 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME, LOG_CONTENT , LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(@SUP_ID, @ADM_ID, @ADM_NAME , '登录成功', 'LOGIN_SUCCESS', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 记录日志登录失败 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO ADM_LOG( SUP_ID, ADM_ID, ADM_NAME , LOG_CONTENT, LOG_TYPE, LOG_TIME, LOG_PWD, LOG_CONTEXT, LOG_ADMID , LOG_REF, LOG_AGENT, LOG_IP) VALUES(isnull(@G_SUP_ID,-1), isnull(@G_ADM_ID,-1), @ADM_LID , '失败', 'LOGIN_FAIL', @SYS_DATE, @PWD1, @SYS_CONTEXTPATH, @ADM_LID , @SYS_REMOTE_REFERER, @SYS_USER_AGENT, @SYS_REMOTEIP)

Set.Name: 绑定微信用户
Set.Sql: IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM WX_USER_ADM_USER WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND ADM_ID=@ADM_ID AND SUP_ID=@SUP_ID AND ROLE_TYPE = 'ERP' AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ) INSERT INTO WX_USER_ADM_USER (WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, ROLE_TYPE, ADM_ID, SUP_ID, CDATE) select WX_CFG_NO, AUTH_WEIXIN_ID, 'ERP', @ADM_ID, @SUP_ID, @SYS_DATE from wx_user WHERE AUTH_WEIXIN_ID=@OPEN_ID AND WX_CFG_NO = @WX_CFG_NO ;

Set.Name: 检查原生App是否需要更新
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP=@APP_NAME ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD DESC;

Set.Name: 更新FPWD使用时间B2B
Set.Sql: UPDATE WEB_USER_FPWD SET FP_UDATE=@SYS_DATE where FP_UNID=@FP_UNID and FP_VALIDCODE=@FP_VALIDCODE and FP_TYPE='B2B_ADM_LOGIN' and FP_UDATE is null and FP_EDATE>@SYS_DATE
